category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a fast, memory-efficient counter of DNA k-mers; official GitHub repository describes Jellyfish as a fast multi-threaded k-mer counter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to official repository gmarcais/Jellyfish; repository title uses 'Jellyfish'.
docs_sources: Official repository contains a doc directory and README; no separate official documentation domain was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/gmarcais/Jellyfish; per instruction repo returned null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies DNA k-mer counting; source_facts.executables lists jellyfish CLI.
